title: 「So that」目的句型
titleEn: Using so that to express purpose

omissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules and Benefits explanations are faithful editorial translations.

formula: Main clause + so that + subject + can / could / will / would / may / might + base verb + other information

formulas.formula: Main clause + so that + subject + can / could / will / would / may / might + base verb + other information

example: I started studying for IELTS so that I could get a job.
exampleZh: 我開始準備 IELTS，為的是找到工作。

examples.en: I started studying for IELTS so that I could get a job.
examples.zh: 我開始準備 IELTS，為的是找到工作。
examples.highlight: so that I could get a job

examples.en: The teacher repeated the instructions so that everyone could understand.
examples.zh: 老師重複了指示，好讓每個人都能明白。

meaning.zh: So that 用來說明一個行動希望達到的目的，後面接包含主語、情態動詞和原形動詞的完整子句。

rules.en: So that expresses an intended purpose, not merely a result.
rules.zh: So that 前面是所採取的行動，後面的子句說明希望達到的目標，而不只是偶然結果。
examples: I saved the document so that I could read it later.

rules.en: So that must be followed by a complete clause with its own subject and verb.
rules.zh: So that 後面要接有自己主語和動詞的完整子句。
examples: I spoke slowly so that the child could understand.

rules.en: Choose the modal verb to match time and meaning: can/will, could/would, may/might or their negative forms.
rules.zh: 情態動詞須配合時間和意思：現在或一般目的用 can／will，過去目的用 could／would，較不確定目的用 may／might。
examples: She writes a list so that she can remember everything.
He lowered his voice so that he would not disturb anyone.

rules.en: The two clauses may have different subjects.
rules.zh: 前後兩部分可以使用不同主語，因此可清楚說明一個人採取行動，好讓另一個人做到某件事。
examples: The teacher repeated the instructions so that everyone could understand.

rules.en: So that expresses purpose, while so introduces a result or consequence. Use the full form so that in this exercise.
rules.zh: So that 表示目的；so 表示結果或後果。本練習必須使用完整的 so that。
examples: I spoke slowly so that everyone could understand.

benefits.en: It states the purpose of an action clearly.
benefits.zh: 讀者可以立即明白某個行動是為了甚麼，不需要自行猜測兩個意思之間的關係。

benefits.en: It allows different subjects before and after it.
benefits.zh: 可清楚表達一個人、機構或物件採取行動，好讓另一個人得到幫助或完成事情。

benefits.en: It joins an action and its goal in one sentence.
benefits.zh: 把兩個相關意思自然連接，避免寫成兩個零散短句。

benefits.en: It is suitable for explaining plans, instructions and design purposes.
benefits.zh: 適合說明規則、服務、工具、設備或安排為何存在。

benefits.en: It provides another natural way to express purpose.
benefits.zh: 可取代 because someone wants to 或 to + verb，令說話和寫作更有變化。

sourceOmissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules and Benefits explanations are faithful editorial translations.

en: Rewrite each sentence using so that to show its purpose.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 so that 改寫以下句子，以表達目的。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: I went to the library because I wanted to borrow a book.
questions.promptZh: 我去了圖書館，因為我想借一本書。
questions.answer: I went to the library so that I could borrow a book.
questions.answerZh: 我去了圖書館，以便借一本書。
questions.highlight: I went to the library so that I could borrow a book.

questions.answerZh: 主辦者安排了兩段短暫休息時間，好讓參加者可以休息和提問。
questions.highlight: Two short breaks were scheduled by the organiser so that participants could rest and ask questions.

questions.prompt: The public library extended its opening hours because it wanted people who work late to have enough time to borrow and return books.
questions.promptZh: 公共圖書館延長開放時間，因為它希望較遲下班的人有足夠時間借還書籍。
questions.answer: The public library extended its opening hours so that people who work late could have enough time to borrow and return books.
questions.answerZh: 公共圖書館延長開放時間，好讓較遲下班的人有足夠時間借還書籍。
questions.highlight: The public library extended its opening hours so that people who work late could have enough time to borrow and return books.
